'''choyalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiomaxillary|labiomaxillary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiomaxillary|labiomaxillary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| choyalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyalithi|choyalithi]] || [[word:choyaliji|choyaliji]] || [[word:choyalishi|choyalishi]] || [[word:choyaliki|choyaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyaluthuthu|choyaluthuthu]] || [[word:choyalujuju|choyalujuju]] || [[word:choyalushushu|choyalushushu]] || [[word:choyalukuku|choyalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyaluthu|choyaluthu]] || [[word:choyaluju|choyaluju]] || [[word:choyalushu|choyalushu]] || [[word:choyaluku|choyaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyalufthuf|choyalufthuf]] || [[word:choyalufjuf|choyalufjuf]] || [[word:choyalufshuf|choyalufshuf]] || [[word:choyalufkuf|choyalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyalethe|choyalethe]] || [[word:choyaleje|choyaleje]] || [[word:choyaleshe|choyaleshe]] || [[word:choyaleke|choyaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyalothotho|choyalothotho]] || [[word:choyalojojo|choyalojojo]] || [[word:choyaloshosho|choyaloshosho]] || [[word:choyalokoko|choyalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyalotho|choyalotho]] || [[word:choyalojo|choyalojo]] || [[word:choyalosho|choyalosho]] || [[word:choyaloko|choyaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyalofthof|choyalofthof]] || [[word:choyalofjof|choyalofjof]] || [[word:choyalofshof|choyalofshof]] || [[word:choyalofkof|choyalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyalïfthïf|choyalïfthïf]] || [[word:choyalïfjïf|choyalïfjïf]] || [[word:choyalïfshïf|choyalïfshïf]] || [[word:choyalïfkïf|choyalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyalïfthïfthïf|choyalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:choyalïfjïfjïf|choyalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:choyalïfshïfshïf|choyalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:choyalïfkïfkïf|choyalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyalïfthïf|choyalïfthïf]] || [[word:choyalïfjïf|choyalïfjïf]] || [[word:choyalïfshïf|choyalïfshïf]] || [[word:choyalïfkïf|choyalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyalïfthïf|choyalïfthïf]] || [[word:choyalïfjïf|choyalïfjïf]] || [[word:choyalïfshïf|choyalïfshïf]] || [[word:choyalïfkïf|choyalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyalæthæ|choyalæthæ]] || [[word:choyalæjæ|choyalæjæ]] || [[word:choyalæshæ|choyalæshæ]] || [[word:choyalækæ|choyalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyalathatha|choyalathatha]] || [[word:choyalajaja|choyalajaja]] || [[word:choyalashasha|choyalashasha]] || [[word:choyalakaka|choyalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyalatha|choyalatha]] || [[word:choyalaja|choyalaja]] || [[word:choyalasha|choyalasha]] || [[word:choyalaka|choyalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyalafthaf|choyalafthaf]] || [[word:choyalafjaf|choyalafjaf]] || [[word:choyalafshaf|choyalafshaf]] || [[word:choyalafkaf|choyalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:choyalasha|choyalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyalshësha|choyalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyalrosha|choyalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyalmusha|choyalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyalyasha|choyalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyalnkshësha|gochoyalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyalnkrosha|gochoyalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyalnkmusha|gochoyalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyalnkyasha|gochoyalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:choyayalasha|choyayalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyayalshësha|choyayalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyayalrosha|choyayalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyayalmusha|choyayalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyayalyasha|choyayalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyayalnkshësha|gochoyayalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyayalnkrosha|gochoyayalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyayalnkmusha|gochoyayalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyayalnkyasha|gochoyayalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:cheyælasha|cheyælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cheyælshësha|cheyælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cheyælrosha|cheyælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cheyælmusha|cheyælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cheyælyasha|cheyælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocheyælnkshësha|gocheyælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocheyælnkrosha|gocheyælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocheyælnkmusha|gocheyælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocheyælnkyasha|gocheyælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:choyfalasha|choyfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyfalshësha|choyfalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyfalrosha|choyfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyfalmusha|choyfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyfalyasha|choyfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyfalnkshësha|gochoyfalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyfalnkrosha|gochoyfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyfalnkmusha|gochoyfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyfalnkyasha|gochoyfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
